entity.description:
• Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers are proudly designed in Singapore for our hot and humid climate, giving your baby all-day comfort with clean, trusted protection.
• Made to be ultra-thin yet highly absorbent, our diapers keep little ones cool, dry, and safe —so they can move, play, and sleep comfortably. Featuring a 10% wider absorbent core, Peachy Bum delivers up to 12 hours of leak protection, keeping your baby dry through the night.
• From active days to peaceful nights, one diaper does it all—no switching, no worries. Just soft, breathable comfort your baby deserves, every single day.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers are not your average diapers. Here’s why parents love them: Clean and gentle you can trust – Double-accredited and suitable for babies with sensitive skin, with quality trusted by local hospitals.
• Up to 12 hours of leak protection – Keeps your baby dry throughout the night so mummies (and daddies) can enjoy a more peaceful sleep.
• Cloud-soft comfort – Incredibly soft on delicate skin and made without lotions, latex, or fragrance. Just pure, premium care for your little one.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: China

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• The best place to store Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers is in a cool, dry and organised drawer.
• Do avoid direct sunlight and humid areas.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Made by OJI, Japan's largest paper product company Genki! nappies have "Multi-Channel" absorption layer 1. Unique 3D technology: Dots and Wave combined texture for inner layer; 2. Super Absorbency: up to 12 hours protection 3. Super Elastic Waistband for better fit on babies; 4. Powerful side and back leakage block; 5. Wetness Indicator: Color will change to blue from yellow after baby pees; 6. Softness: soft like baby's skin 7. Made in Japan

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• New soft outer cover and comfort fit waist provides a greater comfort for baby
• A specially designed absorbent core (Activ-core) helps to quickly absorb urine, prevent flow-back and provide longer-lasting dryness
• 2-in-1 leak guards that gently hug baby's legs to prevent leaks that are easily removed by tearing seams on both sides, even when soiled
• 4 Natural plant extracts (Aloe vera, chamomile, olive and vitamin E) helps to keep your baby's skin healthy and comfortable

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Our diaper liner contains plant-based materials, sustainably sourced with the planet in mind

• Our diaper bag & box are recycle-ready. These can be recycled with the relevant recycle system

• Huggies mills have reduced 15% CO2, equal to 3,500 fewer cars on the road in the last 4 years, to help reduce global warming

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: China

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. How to wear:
- Put on like normal pants, with the word "Front" on the front side
2. How to remove soiled diaper pants:
-Tear off both side seams to remove
3. How to dispose of soiled diaper pants:
- Roll up the soiled diaper pants and dispose in the trash after use
• Caution: 1. Please dispose used diapers in trash can 2. To avoid risk of suffocation, keep plastic bag away from babies and children

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool & dry place, away from direct sunlight.

product.description: NEW Huggies Platinum Naturemade Diapers & Pants now specially created with carefully selected natural ingredients to leverage the Goodness of Nature in caring for baby’s delicate skin whilst delivering superior 12 hour absorbency protection. The liner material is made from 100% imported natural fibers with added skin loving Vitamin E from wheat germ oil whilst harmful chemicals like heavy metals, elemental chlorine & dioxin have been thoughtfully removed to ensure the best care for skin. Together with the advanced ZeroFeel Technology from Kimberly Clark, Huggies Platinum Naturemade Diapers & Pants helps keep your baby skin comfortable and dry all the time as if wearing nothing at all.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Moony has super-slim absorber that absorbs up to 12 hours of urine and has special "soft-stretch" material that fits the body well as your baby moves.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Japan

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• To wear:
1. Put on like pants (roll up tape is to be at the back)
2. Leg gathers and waistband must be fitted, not folded over
• To dispose:
1. Tear off side seams
2. Roll up diaper from crotch to waistband
3. Pull up tape that is attached on back sheet
4. Attach roll up tape on diaper
5. Dispose stool in toilet
6. Do not flush used diapers in toilet
7. To prevent rashes, clean and change diaper immediately upon soiling

Unique 3D technology: Dots and Wave combined texture for inner layer; 2. Super Absorbency: up to 12 hours protection 3. Super Elastic Waistband for better fit on babies; 4. Powerful side and back leakage block; 5. Wetness Indicator: Color will change to blue from yellow after baby pees; 6. Softness: soft like baby's skin 7. Made in Japan
metaData.Preparation: Made by OJI, Japan's largest paper product company Genki nappies have "Multi-Channel" absorption layer 1. Unique 3D technology: Dots and Wave combined texture for inner layer; 2. Super Absorbency: up to 12 hours protection 3. Super Elastic Waistband for better fit on babies; 4. Powerful side and back leakage block; 5. Wetness Indicator: Color will change to blue from yellow after baby pees; 6. Softness: soft like baby's skin
